name: Parse Function Call from Query
description: Parses a user query to extract function parameters and generate a function call with the appropriate structure
reasoning: This workflow needs to parse a user query to extract function parameters and generate a structured function call. The task requires extracting numerical values (base=10, height=5) and string values (unit="units") from natural language text, then formatting them into a specific function call structure. Since this involves understanding natural language context and extracting structured data with semantic meaning (distinguishing base vs height, understanding units), this requires LLM capabilities rather than simple regex parsing. The llm_extract template provides the foundation for structured data extraction from text, which I've adapted to specifically handle function parameter extraction and formatting into the required output structure.
